qa_pairs.question: How do you upload an image to the New Arbutus Cloud using the command line interface?
qa_pairs.answer: You can upload an image using the command: `openstack --os-cloud <cloud> image create --private --file <file> <newImageName>`.

qa_pairs.question: After an image has been uploaded to the New Arbutus Cloud, how can a user create a new volume from it using the web user interface?
qa_pairs.answer: In the New Arbutus Cloud web UI, navigate to Compute -> Images. The uploaded image from the previous step should be there. In the drop down menu for the image, select the option 'Create Volume', and the volume will be created from the image. The created volume can then be attached to instances or used to boot a new instance.
